description: Fix the GitLab plugin to use the configSchema instanceUrl setting instead of the hardcoded gitlab.com API base URL, enabling self-hosted GitLab instances.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/gitlab && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Derive API base URL from configSchema instanceUrl setting
userStories.description: Replace the hardcoded API_BASE constant with a dynamic function that reads the instanceUrl from configSchema, falling back to gitlab.com.
acceptanceCriteria: API base URL is derived from getConfig('instanceUrl') when set, falling back to 'https://gitlab.com/api/v4'
The hardcoded `const API_BASE = 'https://gitlab.com/api/v4'` constant is removed or replaced with a function
buildUrl function uses the dynamic API base
